pages.text: $(l)Runic Infusion$() channels the power of Botania runes in your inventory to buff your spell power.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 10$(br)$(l)Type:$() Buff$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 50,000 + 20,000/level$(br2)The more Botania runes you carry, the stronger the buff. With $(o)runicInfusionRuneScaling$() enabled (default), each unique rune type adds additional power. This synergizes heavily with the Spell Catalyst system.
